cn: 这是「小镇有灵」，一个像素风格的、集成大语言模型的生活模拟原型。
en: This is "Living Town", a pixel-style life-simulation prototype built around a large language model.

cn: 核心设计是：确定性引擎当地板，大语言模型只当声音。即使没有任何模型，小镇也能照常运转。
en: Core design: a deterministic engine as the floor, the LLM only as a voice. Even with no model at all, the town keeps living.

cn: 屏幕上的每个居民，都有需求、作息、性格、记忆，以及与他人的关系。
en: Every resident here has needs, routines, personality, memory, and relationships with others.

cn: 两轮架构评审——内部多智能体评审，与 GPT-5.5——都指向同一个致命缺陷：引擎里原本没有任何居民之间的交互。
en: Two rounds of review, an internal multi-agent panel and GPT-5.5, found the same fatal gap: the engine had no agent-to-agent interaction.

cn: 所以我们先把社交，做成一等的确定性能力：打招呼、送礼、传八卦，都走同一套社交事务协议。
en: So we first made social interaction a first-class deterministic capability: greeting, gifting, and gossip all flow through one social-transaction protocol.

cn: 每次互动都会发起、被接受或被拒绝，然后提交；双方和旁观者，各自写下视角不同的记忆。
en: Each interaction is proposed, accepted or refused, then committed; both parties and bystanders record memories from different viewpoints.

cn: 八卦只能通过交谈或亲眼所见传播。这就是知识边界：没人会凭空知道一个秘密。
en: Gossip spreads only by talking or witnessing. This is the knowledge boundary: nobody learns a secret out of thin air.

cn: 在社交之上，是承诺系统。居民们会约定，稍后在某处见面。
en: Above social interaction sits the commitment system. Residents agree to meet somewhere later.

cn: 临近约定时间，他们会主动赴约；可一旦某项需求陷入危机，就可能爽约。
en: As the deadline nears, they head to the rendezvous; but if a need hits crisis, they may flake.

cn: 爽约会埋下怨气。怨气累积到一定程度，就会触发一段冲突。
en: Flaking plants resentment. Once it builds up enough, a conflict is triggered.

cn: 冲突有完整的生命周期：积怨、当面对质、道歉、和解，或者久拖不决，变成冷战。
en: Conflicts have a full lifecycle: resentment, confrontation, apology, reconciliation, or, left alone, a lingering cold war.

cn: 你在左下角日志里看到的「把话说开」和「两人和解」，全是零模型、确定性地涌现出来的。
en: The phrases in the log at bottom-left, clearing the air and reconciling, all emerge deterministically, with zero model.

cn: 所有逻辑都先用 Node 端口验证，再回写 Godot，并在真实引擎里跑通：十三条不变量，跨多个随机种子，全部通过。
en: All logic is first validated in a Node port, ported back to Godot, and run in the real engine: thirteen invariants, across many seeds, all passing.

cn: 为了让小镇不再简陋，地面、草木和房屋都换上了 CC0 像素素材，并叠加了昼夜光照。
en: To make the town less bare, the ground, foliage and houses now use free CC0 pixel art, with a day-night lighting cycle layered on top.

cn: 居民相遇时，会在头顶冒出对话和心情。这些台词目前是模板，将来交给模型生成。
en: When residents meet, dialogue and mood pop up over their heads. These lines are templates for now, to be generated by the model later.

cn: 你可以暂停、加速、缩放，还能拖动底部的时间轴，确定性地回放任意时刻。
en: You can pause, speed up, zoom, and drag the timeline at the bottom to deterministically replay any moment.

cn: 点选任意居民，就能像观察演化一样，查看他此刻的需求、关系、信念与记忆。
en: Click any resident and, like an evolution observatory, inspect their needs, relationships, beliefs and memories at that very moment.

cn: 确定性的地基，已经就绪。下一步，才是让大语言模型，为这些有灵魂的居民，赋予真正的声音。
en: The deterministic foundation is ready. Next, we let the language model give these living residents their true voice.
